title: coreopsis palmata
intro: Coreopsis palmata, also known as the meadow coreopsis or pale coreopsis, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Coreopsis palmata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
